methods.void annotateClass(Class\u00a0cl):
Subclasses may implement this method to allow class data to be stored in
 the stream.
methods.void annotateProxyClass(Class\u00a0cl):
Subclasses may implement this method to store custom data in the stream
 along with descriptors for dynamic proxy classes.
methods.void defaultWriteObject():
Write the non-static and non-transient fields of the current class to
 this stream.
methods.void drain(): Drain any buffered data in ObjectOutputStream.
methods.boolean enableReplaceObject(boolean\u00a: Enable the stream to do replacement of objects in the stream.
methods.ObjectOutputStream.PutField putFields():
Retrieve the object used to buffer persistent fields to be written to
 the stream.
methods.protectedObject replaceObject(Objectobj):
This method will allow trusted subclasses of ObjectOutputStream to
 substitute one object for another during serialization.
methods.void reset():
Reset will disregard the state of any objects already written to the
 stream.
methods.void useProtocolVersion(int\u00a0version: Specify stream protocol version to use when writing the stream.
methods.void write(byte[]\u00a0buf,\n int\u0: Writes a sub array of bytes.
methods.void writeBytes(Stringstr): Writes a String as a sequence of bytes.
methods.void writeChars(Stringstr): Writes a String as a sequence of chars.
methods.void writeClassDescriptor(ObjectStreamCl: Write the specified class descriptor to the ObjectOutputStream.
methods.void writeFields(): Write the buffered fields to the stream.
methods.void writeObject(Objectobj): Write the specified object to the ObjectOutputStream.
methods.void writeObjectOverride(Objectobj): Method used by subclasses to override the default writeObject method.
methods.void writeStreamHeader():
The writeStreamHeader method is provided so subclasses can append or
 prepend their own header to the stream.
methods.void writeUnshared(Objectobj): Writes an "unshared" object to the ObjectOutputStream.
methods.void writeUTF(Stringstr): Primitive data write of this String inmodified UTF-8format.
